rationale: All Fully-Automated gates (AC1, AC2, AC7) pass green (bun run check, bun run test:unit:ci, bun run lint all pass with only pre-existing/unrelated warnings). Hybrid gates (AC3, AC5, AC6) and the Agent-Probe gate (AC4) self-skip/defer per the pre-accepted structural known-gaps documented in the validate-contract (no live Postgres, no shared Playwright auth fixture in this environment) — both carry backlog stubs and neither is a new gap introduced by this session. Both PVL-supplement binding fixes (E1 audit-trail logging, E2 current-stage guard) are implemented exactly as specified and independently re-verified against source during this EXECUTE pass. The moveLeadStage done branch is structurally isolated from won/lost metadata (confirmed by code read + new regression test). The inline-edit auth gate is unchanged and genuinely inherited (confirmed by code read + adversarial-validation.json). One NEW structural blocker was discovered and is NOT fixable within this plan's scope: a pre-existing drizzle snapshot-chain collision blocks bun run db:generate entirely. This is documented as a backlog note and does not block code-complete status for the rest of the plan — the schema.ts source-of-truth change is correct, typechecked, and tested; only the physical migration SQL artifact is deferred pending a separate fix-me task.
